commit_message:
[kmac] Zero capacity of KMAC against SW (sideload only) [kmac] Zero capacity of KMAC against SW (sideload only) One possible low-cost way to fix #17508. At the end of KMAC operation, it zeroes the capacity part of Keccak state that is passed to TL-UL primitives.

Few questions that I'm asking myself about this PR and the main issue:

- Is `kmac_app` is the right submodule to do this?
- Should we also try to raise an error if SW tries to read from capacity? At the moment, I do not see a good
